name: Media Hero
description: A full-bleed image hero composed with pile, frame, cover, center, stack, and cluster primitives.
projectCss: Image choice, scrim color, typography, button treatment, and hero-specific contrast remain project-owned.
responsive: The same overlay composition stays centered on desktop and mobile while Axoloth variables tune the media crop and hero height.

name: Editorial Split Layout
description: An editorial feature that pairs long-form copy with portrait media using intrinsic split and flow primitives.
projectCss: Editorial type scale, rules, caption style, color palette, and image treatment remain project-owned.
responsive: The split wraps into one readable column when either region can no longer satisfy its intrinsic minimum width.

name: Gallery with Dialog
description: A responsive object gallery that opens an accessible Axoloth dialog with project-owned content binding.
projectCss: Artwork crops, gallery typography, hover treatment, and the tiny content-binding script remain project-owned.
responsive: Auto-grid chooses the column count from available width, while the dialog remains viewport-bound with focus trapping and Escape dismissal.
